file: 877_Ferreira 等 - 2025 - Co–Mo Catalysts Supported on CNTH-ZSM-5 Composites for Selective Production of Sustainable Aviation.txt

experiments.reaction_type: 加氢脱氧反应、裂化反应、异构化反应
experiments.reaction_type_english: Hydrodeoxygenation reaction, Cracking reaction, Isomerization reaction
experiments.description: 在批次反应器中，使用Co-Mo/CNT-H-ZSM-5复合催化剂，在325°C、20 bar初始H2压力下，催化棕榈酸（模型化合物）转化3小时，生产可持续航空燃料范围的烷烃（C8-C16）。反应包括脱氧生成烷烃，随后对所得烷烃进行裂化和异构化。
experiments.text_snippet: Catalytic Reactions. All of the reactions were performed in a 100 mL stainless steel batch reactor...500 mg of palmitic acid in 50 mL of n-decane was loaded inside the reactor with 100 mg of the catalyst...the H2 pressure was set to 20 bar (at 25 °C), and the reactor was heated to 325 °C, holding at this temperature for 3 h with 300 rpm of the stirring rate...tested in the deoxygenation of palmitic acid, followed by the isomerization and cracking of the resulting alkanes.

Catalyst composition.original: Co (2.5 wt %), Mo (10.5 wt %), CNT, H-ZSM-5

Catalyst stability.original: Progressive deactivation observed over 4 consecutive runs due to coke deposition
